items.title: SheetGenius AI
items.description: SheetGenius AI is a web app that creates Excel formulas using natural language.

items.title: E-commerce Website
items.description: A website created with Next.JS, Stripe and Sanity. It simulates an e-commerce store in which you can validate payments with Stripe.

items.title: Gym App
items.description: A gym app with a variety of exercises. It uses Rapid API to fetch exercises and the related YouTube videos.

items.title: Event App
items.description: An events platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. Create and attend events with secure authentication, Stripe payments and server-side rendering for fast page loads.

items.title: Social Media Website
items.description: A Pinterest-like site to post, save and comment on pictures. Built with React, Google Auth and Sanity. Register to post or browse anonymously.

items.title: Open AI Chat
items.description: A GPT-powered chatbot built for my personal portfolio, showcasing conversational AI that handles a wide range of queries.

items.title: Core Construcciones Website
items.description: Website for a construction company, rebuilt with Astro, Pages CMS, GitHub and Cloudflare Pages so the client can edit content directly.

items.title: Docker HomeLab
items.description: Collection of Docker Compose stacks I run on my HomeLab to self-host services. CI lints every compose file on push to keep the lab reproducible.
